---
title: "fongping hydro main"
format: pdf
editor: visual
---

# INPUT

## PACKAGE
```{r}
packages <- name listing 
packages <- c(
  "tidyverse",
  "here",
  "ggplot2",
  "httr2",
  "jsonlite"
)

installed_packages <- rownames(installed.packages())

for (pkg in packages) {
  if (!pkg %in% installed_packages) {
    install.packages(pkg)
  }
}

invisible(lapply(packages, library, character.only = TRUE))
```

## MODULES
```{r}
source(here("module", "hydro_finance.R"))
```

## READ DATA
```{r}
csv_files <- list.files(
  here("data"),
  pattern = "\\.csv$",
  full.names = TRUE
)

csv_files

flow_data <- read_csv(csv_files[1])

ls()
```

# baseline

## reservoir module

### run reservoir for a year (time step)

### sediment ?

## MONEY MODULE

### daily energy generation \* 365

### yearly profit

### 100 NPV

# CC scenario (deviation of the inflow increase / maybe percipitation data)

## lishan station data

### CC saga \<-- manipulation of inflow data
